ProbeID: NCBI Probe database id of reagent.
GeneID: NCBI Entrez Gene database id of target gene.
SignalCtbRep1: Signal in raw fluorescence units of Cell Titer Blue assay, replicate 1.
SignalCtbRep2: Signal in raw fluorescence units of Cell Titer Blue assay, replicate 2.
SignalCtbRep3: Signal in raw fluorescence units of Cell Titer Blue assay, replicate 3.
CtbZscore: Z score (number of standard deviations away from the sample mean) of the median replicate value for this reagent.
DuplicateSignalCtbRep1: Signal in raw fluorescence units of Cell Titer Blue assay, replicate 1 of duplicate reagent assay, where applicable.
DuplicateSignalCtbRep2: Signal in raw fluorescence units of Cell Titer Blue assay, replicate 2 of duplicate reagent assay, where applicable.
DuplicateSignalCtbRep3: Signal in raw fluorescence units of Cell Titer Blue assay, replicate 3 of duplicate reagent assay, where applicable.
DuplicateCtbZscore: Z score (number of standard deviations away from the sample mean) of the median replicate value for the duplicate assay of this reagent, where applicable.

Phenotype: Indicates type of activity observed: inhibitor, activator, fluorescent, cytotoxic, inactive, or inconclusive.
Potency: Concentration at which compound exhibits half-maximal efficacy, AC50. Extrapolated AC50s also include the highest efficacy observed and the concentration of compound at which it was observed.
Efficacy: Maximal efficacy of compound, reported as a percentage of control. These values are estimated based on fits of the Hill equation to the dose-response curves.
Analysis Comment: Annotation/notes on a particular compound's data or its analysis.
Curve_Description: A description of dose-response curve quality. A complete curve has two observed asymptotes; a partial curve may not have attained its second asymptote at the highest concentration tested. High efficacy curves exhibit efficacy greater than 80% of control. Partial efficacies are statistically significant, but below 80% of control.
Fit_LogAC50: The logarithm of the AC50 from a fit of the data to the Hill equation (calculated based on Molar Units).
Fit_HillSlope: The Hill slope from a fit of the data to the Hill equation.
Fit_R2: R^2 fit value of the curve. Closer to 1.0 equates to better Hill equation fit.
Fit_InfiniteActivity: The asymptotic efficacy from a fit of the data to the Hill equation.
Fit_ZeroActivity: Efficacy at zero concentration of compound from a fit of the data to the Hill equation.
Fit_CurveClass: Numerical encoding of curve description for the fitted Hill equation.
Excluded_Points: Which dose-response titration points were excluded from analysis based on outlier analysis. Each number represents whether a titration point was (1) or was not (0) excluded, for the titration series going from smallest to highest compound concentrations.
Max_Response: Maximum activity observed for compound (usually at highest concentration tested).
Compound QC: NCGC designation for data stage: 'qHTS', 'qHTS Verification', 'Secondary Profiling'
